name: imagga
description: Reads Imagga account API usage and per-image tags/categories via the Imagga REST API. Read-only. The colors and faces_detections detection streams are not yet ported — see docs.md Known limits.

risk.read: external Imagga API read of account usage data and per-image tags/categories
risk.approval: none; read-only, no obviously-safe reverse-ETL writes
